title: Cleanups
body:
Do not merge now, as is this depends on and includes #29, filed mostly as a reminder to myself.

The cleanups are equally applicable to the non-#29 code, but the commits wouldn’t apply; after we deal with #29 I will rebase this manually one way or the other.

comments.body: The `.ping()` move is fine as is right now; eventually `GetManifest` might need to call it explicitly again to get the API version—but even if that happened, we would want `makeRequest` to call it implicitly, and to cache the results so that it is called at most once, whatever higher-level methods are called.

This is now ready for review, as a second component of Atomic Registry support. It is built on top of #29 (i.e. start with the “Remove a redundant dockerImageSource.makeRequest parameter” commit), I will be rebasing as necessary.

This PR is a set of fixes to docker.go, most of them necessary for the OpenShift client.
I'll merge after my comment above
could you rebase it? (not sure what's happened :?)
Rebased (I think the merge of #38 happened).
